# {{name}}

{{label}} for [`a14y`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/a14y). Installing this package gives you the same CLI under the `{{bin}}` command name.

<!-- include: fragments/_links.md -->

```bash
npx {{bin}} https://example.com
```

Everything the `a14y` CLI does, `{{bin}}` does — same binary, same flags. For full documentation and the command reference, see the [a14y package on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/a14y) or the [project README on GitHub](https://github.com/timothyjordan/a14y).
